response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires an executive-level CTO with 5+ years in senior technical leadership, demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure depth, and a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows no people-management or executive leadership experience, no production multi-agent AI systems, and only tangential fintech exposure. The gap between IC senior engineer and CTO of a venture-backed fintech scale-up is substantial.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Sociomantic millions of req/s)
Recent exposure to agentic/MCP tooling at Stripe and strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Founder/open-source experience (GISCollective) showing initiative, ownership, and full-lifecycle product delivery
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated/high-stakes environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit, liquidity, compliance) — RIDE Capital tenure was IC-level and brief

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
